casepack.title: Nuclear Physics Demonstration Stub
casepack.description: Minimal Tier-1 demonstration unit for the nuclear_physics domain. Full closure code lives in closures/nuclear_physics/ (binding energy, decay chains, QGP/RHIC); this casepack is a placeholder packaging demonstration pending domain-specific raw measurements.

run_intent.notes: Stub demonstration unit for the nuclear_physics domain. Three uniform channels at c=0.99 yield a Stable regime under canon thresholds. Pending replacement with domain-specific raw measurements drawn from the closure code in closures/nuclear_physics/.
